inline_comments.message:
unless I'm misreading this, this can set action to self.ACTION_INIT only if it is already self.ACTION_INIT (i.e. not self.ACTION_UPGRADE).

i dont see where we check if the model is already created and proceed to deploy the types in the init folder only if the model doesnt already exist

existence of the upgrade folder does not guarantee the model has already been deployed. It will depend on the 'from' version in the upgrade path. The condition should be if the model is in 'models' then upgrade otherwise init
